posts_per_day_rationale: User-confirmed diminishing returns beyond 5 videos per day per channel; 5 slots is the hard ceiling, not a lower bound. Skill must never schedule a 6th slot on the same calendar day (it would starve the next day's queue and underperform engagement-wise).
viral_score_threshold_note: Default filter for which clips to surface for review. `opusclip list --project P --summary` returns scores 0-100; filter at this floor before presenting to the user.
default_durations_note: Passed to `opusclip submit --durations`. The 30-90s window covers the sweet spot for YT Shorts, Reels, and TikTok without tripping platform minimum-length enforcement. Never let OpusClip default to Auto.
default_model_note: ClipBasic for talking-head essays (EVC's standard long-form). Override to ClipAnything + --prompt only when you want directed curation around a specific theme.
notes: Times are local to `timezone`. OpusClip account is configured for America/Los_Angeles. Do NOT exceed `posts_per_day_cap` per day — user has confirmed diminishing returns above 5/day. Pre-2026-05-18 fields (enhancer_settings, workflow_setup, drive_upload) removed — these governed the old browser-automation flow which is replaced by the `opusclip` CLI.
